error.sway-detail: Sway support may be added in a future update (similar format to Hyprland)
error.labwc-detail: LabWC uses XML config format which is incompatible with this plugin
error.unknown-detail: This plugin only supports Hyprland and Niri compositors
error.hyprctl-failed: hyprctl binds failed - is Hyprland running?

panel.loading-timeout: Loading timed out. Click Refresh to retry.
panel.title: Keymap

settings.title: Keybind Cheatsheet Settings
settings.description: Configure the appearance and keybind sources for the keybind cheatsheet panel.
settings.auto-height-hint: When 'Auto' is enabled, height adjusts automatically based on content.
settings.columns-hint: More columns work better with wider windows.
settings.merge-sequential-hint: Combine consecutive numeric keybinds (e.g. Super+1..5 -> Workspace 1..5) into a single ranged entry.
settings.show-undescribed-hint: Include keybinds that have no comment description. They will be auto-labeled with the action.
settings.split-workspaces-hint: When a workspace category exceeds the threshold, split it into Switching, Moving, and Mouse subcategories.
settings.config-paths-description: Specify custom paths to your keybind configuration files. The plugin will automatically parse the appropriate file based on your compositor and follow all include/source directives.
settings.hyprland-format-hint:
Expected format: bind = $mod, KEY, action #"description"
Categories: # 1. CATEGORY NAME
settings.niri-format-hint:
Categories are created with: // #"Category Name"
Descriptions: hotkey-overlay-title="description"
settings.refresh-message: Keybinds will be reloaded when you open the panel.
settings.reset-message: Settings have been reset to defaults.
settings.keybind-setup-description: To open the keybind cheatsheet with a keyboard shortcut, add this bind to your compositor config:
settings.keybind-example-hyprland: Hyprland example: bind = $mod, F1, exec, qs -c "noctalia-shell" ipc call plugin:keybind-cheatsheet toggle
settings.mod-var-hint: The variable name used for your Super key (e.g., $mod or $mainMod).
settings.mango-format-hint:
Expected format: bind=MODS,KEY,ACTION,ARGS
Categories: # Category Name (horizontal rules stripped)
Optional per-bind description: trailing #"description"
settings.keybind-example-mango: Mango example: bind=SUPER,F1,spawn_shell,noctalia-shell ipc call plugin:keybind-cheatsheet toggle
settings.appearance-description: Customize the colors used for special key categories. Changes apply immediately and persist when you click Apply.
settings.color-theme-hint: Leave empty to use theme accent color.
settings.color-paste-hint: Tip: copy any hex color (e.g. #FF6B6B) to your clipboard and a paste icon will appear inside the pill for quick paste.
settings.hyprland-lua-hint: Auto: uses hyprland.lua via `hyprctl binds` when it exists, otherwise the legacy .conf parser.
